recommendations.title: Plan de table
recommendations.overview: A brief but intense hug will have the effect of throwing a meticulously planned wedding into chaos. Is chance about to give fate a helping hand?

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Dumb and Dumber
recommendations.overview: Lloyd and Harry are two men whose stupidity is really indescribable. When Mary, a beautiful woman, loses an important suitcase with money before she leaves for Aspen, the two friends (who have found the suitcase) decide to return it to her. After som

recommendations.title: Fiasco in Milan
recommendations.overview: The usual gang of robbers are hired by a thief from Milan to steal a suitcase full of money, but troubles will hinder the success of the operation.

Tells the seemingly random yet vitally connected story of a set of incidents that all converge one evening at 11:14pm. The story follows the chain of events of five different characters and five different storylines that all converge to tell the stor

recommendations.title: Heathers
recommendations.overview: A girl who halfheartedly tries to be part of the "in crowd" of her school meets a rebel who teaches her a more devious way to play social politics: by killing the popular kids.

recommendations.title: The Little Death
recommendations.overview: A comedy film that looks into the loosely connected lives of people with strange sexual fantasies.

recommendations.title: The Man from London
recommendations.overview: A switchman at a seaside railway witnesses a murder but does not report it after he finds a suitcase full of money at the scene of the crime.

recommendations.title: Afterlife of the Party
recommendations.overview: A social butterfly who dies during her birthday week is given a second chance to right her wrongs on Earth.
